events.text: If Rhea was still NPO, we might need to reach out to the provider for an order for D50W.[br6.98][br7.061]In this case, Rhea's blood glucose level was 51 mg/dL,[br12.115][br12.196]so we decided to give her apple juice, as she was on a clear liquid diet.[br16.429][br16.51]Then, we'd monitor and assess Rhea over the course of about 15 minutes[br21.119][br21.2]and check her glucose levels again and determine the next steps.[br25.199][br25.28]At the same time, we wanted to let Rhea know what was going on. How would you explain the situation to her?[br31.944]
